title: 01: Accretion Disc
description: A dark signularity at centre encircled by a dense flat particle disc

title: 02: Binary Drift
description: Two red orbs in a mutual orbit, each with its own particle halo

title: 03: Comet Arc
description: A bright red nucleus, its tail fans on multiple layers

title: 04: Crescent Streaks
description: Several crescents tumble through the frame at different sizes and rotations, each trailing fine parallel speed lines

title: 05: Gravity Lens
description: Hundreds of horizontal field lines cross the canvas. A red orb in the centre acting like a gravitational lens

title: 06: Nested Shells
description: Eight concentric elliptical shells of particles, each tilted at a different angle

title: 07: Orbital Rings
description: A red planet surrounded by a family of elliptical arcs

title: 08: Orbit Dust
description: A red orb at the centre surrounded by a ring system built of tiny particles
